_comment: Written by scripts/regen-src-golden.mjs (#91). `sha256` must match tests/fixtures/src-bundle.golden.js — tests/src-bundle-parity.test.ts enforces it, so a hand-edited golden, or one regenerated by any means that skips the reason prompt, fails the gate.
reason: #94: RbuyBuildings/RbuyStorage now route their 8 native buyBuilding() calls through the new coordinator.coordinatorAllowsBuilding() chokepoint (the #57 reservation guard previously saw only U1's safeBuyBuilding). #103: the MAZ/timefarm/tributefarm/RABfarmstring readers now go through utils.getPageSettingAt() instead of indexing autoTrimpSettings[id].value[i] directly. Both are src changes, so the bundle legitimately moves.
